title: Cell
description: One layer at one scope with a maturity state; the unit of the lattice. Identity excludes maturity by rule (naming-conventions.md).

id.description: Cell identity: {layer}.{scope}.{slug}. Carries no maturity — identity excludes state.

layer.description: Modality axis: the kind of declarative knowledge this cell holds.

scope.description: Grain axis: the size of the unit of work this cell concerns.

maturity.description: The knowledge-state Property. Advanced only through a ledgered transition; never silently edited.

blocked.description: Condition flag (budget cap or no-progress signature), distinct from maturity. Surfaces the cell to the compass.

asset_ref.description: Path to the artifact this cell points at (e.g., spec/intake.md).

signal_refs.description: Evidence artifacts produced by the validation path. gate-signal checks presence before advancing to validated.

validated_against.description: Upstream cells and the content hashes this cell was validated against. Drives mechanical staleness propagation.

attempts.description: Count of advancement attempts; input to no-progress detection.

iterations.description: Iteration cap for the advancing loop.

tokens.description: Token ceiling; loop length dominates cost.
